text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The winner and proud owner of the Derby Umamusume title is...
Special Week! The crowd welcomes its new champion with thunderous
applause!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wow...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hngh... Why? Why did I—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: DANG IIIT!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sei... King...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Uuugh... Well, Spe, you got me good this time.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
The other Classics have nothing on the Derby. I was really looking
forward to taking Gramps and the crowd by surprise today...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But enough of that... What I should be saying here is... Congratulations, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Sei!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...I too must offer my commendations as your competitor.
Congratulations, Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Thank you, King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: But our next race will end in my triumph. I swear... I shall never again let my inexperience get the better of me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Got that? A first-rate racer never lowers her head! The last crown of
the Triple Crown tour will be mine! I swear it!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Come on, you really think I'll hand it over that easily?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
In fact, something tells me the Kikuka Sho's gonna be my race. Call
it... intuition.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm not giving up either! So let's settle this in the next race—the
Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, here she comes! Oooy! Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah, you guys!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Congratulations on winning the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Upbeat Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Spe, you were a totally different racer out there!

text_block_list.name: Caring Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Mm-hm, the final straightaway was where you really shiiined!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
SPEEEE! You were just AMAAAZING! Once again, another Derby
legend has been boooorn!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: A five-length lead... I'm impressed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I could feel your passion radiate through the venue much
more powerfully than at the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Congratulations, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzuka, did you see?! I think that was my best performance yet!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: A complete victory—one where I crossed the finish line way before anyone else! Just like you, Suzuka! Or, at least, that's how it felt...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: When I was running, I just kept thinking about how I was going to tell my moms that I had become a Derby Umamusume. I think that helped too.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It's kinda hard to explain, but that thought really helped at the end.
It felt like my strength really, um, swelled up? Like... um!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It sounds like your dreams gave you an extra helping of strength.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, winning the Japanese Derby feels like I'm one step closer to
becoming the best racer in Japan.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But, but! This is only one step in a really, really long journey...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: So please, help me get even closer to my dream!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Among the mighty racers comprising the Golden Generation, Special
Week now stands apart as the Derby Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And within that title shines the brilliant light of her dream.
choice_data_list: All right, let's set off running!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Okay!
